message:
🐛 Make AI Mission Explorer slightly smaller to show console behind it (#1729)

* 🐛 Make AI Mission Explorer slightly smaller to show console behind it

Change from full-screen fixed overlay (inset-0) to a centered dialog
at 94vw × 90vh with rounded corners, backdrop blur, and a semi-transparent
overlay so the console dashboard is visible behind it.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Add subtle backdrop blur to Mission Explorer overlay

Use backdrop-blur-sm (4px) for a soft blur that keeps the console
recognizable behind the dialog without being fully transparent.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Increase backdrop blur to 8px

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add /missions direct link to open AI Mission Explorer

- /missions → opens the Mission Explorer browser
- /missions/:missionId → opens a specific mission (existing)
- Both preserve UTM params for GA4 attribution

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Increase backdrop blur to md (12px) and darken overlay to 50%

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Increase backdrop blur from 12px to 16px for better visual separation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
